dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.description: Deleting your account permanently removes your volumes, the circles you own, and everything shared through them. This cannot be undone.
dangerZone.confirm: Delete your account? This permanently removes your volumes, the circles you own, and everything shared through them. This cannot be undone.
